advance.description: Move right along the primary progression direction.

hold_position.description: Stop progression while preserving tactical aim or fire.

jump.description: Jump while keeping the requested movement vector.

evade.description: Avoid immediate danger using jump, crouch, stop, or retreat.

fire_target.description: Fire at the selected target. Direction is supplied by target solver.

clear_fixed_threat.description: Lock position and fire until a fixed threat is removed or attack is ineffective.

collect_pickup.description: Open and collect a pickup when survival permits.

guard_teammate.description: Follow, cover, and avoid pushing the human player into danger.

recover_from_stuck.description: Apply forward bias while keeping immediate evasion active.

wait.description: Hold current state for timing or safety.
